parameters.prompt: One photorealistic modular spacecraft cockpit service-wall bay, exactly 2.4 m wide, 2.5 m high and 0.28 m deep. Structural edge rails, removable pressure liner panels, flush equipment access doors, recessed cable and ventilation channel, two handholds, integrated task-light recesses, believable fasteners, seals and physical thickness. Flat rectangular rear mounting plane, isolated single object, visible face +Z. No floor, ceiling, window, room, pipes outside the bay, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit spacecraft interior architecture: warm gray painted alloy panels, dark graphite rails and seals, brushed titanium fasteners, restrained amber maintenance latches, subtle edge and hand wear, no baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, broad dirt, or emissive glow.

strengths: player-facing surfaces contain coherent service panels, rails, handholds and utility relief
main geometry is connected and suitable for measured panel extraction
required_cleanup: extract one flat 2.4 x 2.5 m wall-facing panel and discard box-like side and rear closure
delete two minor disconnected fragments and replace pseudo-controls
preserve the authored 0.28 m maximum wall depth and corridor clearance
